notes: Five-show batch: June arena (Scorpions), August Park density (HS7, Ganxsta 60, WELLHELLO), September electronic headliner (Parov Stelar). Catalog before: 14 events; Aug had 2, Sep had 1; Terézváros had 2.
missingOrUncertain: Scorpions ticket tiers not listed on livenation.hu / mvm-dome.hu at ingest — entryFees empty; show time 19:00 from ticketle.hu.
Heaven Street Seven / Ganxsta / WELLHELLO / Parov Stelar stage time assumed 20:00 after 18:00 gates.
Ganxsta advance 8,999 HUF valid until 15 July 2026 per budapestpark.hu price phase.

document.title: Scorpions — 60th anniversary at MVM Dome
document.shortDescription: German rock legends celebrate six decades — Saturday 20 June 2026, 19:00 at MVM Dome (Wind of Change, Rock You Like a Hurricane).
document.longDescription:
Scorpions bring their 60th-anniversary tour to MVM Dome on Saturday 20 June 2026 at 19:00 — timeless hits for Hungarian fans at 1143 Budapest, Stefánia út 2 (Terézváros). Tickets via Live Nation Hungary and funcode.hu when on sale.

document.title: Heaven Street Seven — ca. 30 reunion at Budapest Park
document.shortDescription: Hungarian alt-rock icons reunite for one Budapest night — Saturday 8 August 2026, gates 18:00.
document.longDescription:
Heaven Street Seven reunite at Budapest Park on Saturday 8 August 2026 for the ca. 30 show — Krisztián Szűcs, Zsolt Ábrahám, Zoltán Takács-Brouwer, Róbert Németh and Gyula Orbán revisit two decades of Hungarian alternative hits. Gates 18:00 at 1095 Budapest, Fábián Juli tér 1.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/en/events/heaven-street-seven-20260808 https://www.budapestpark.hu/tickets/event/HS7260808

document.title: Ganxsta 60 Fesztivál — Budapest Park
document.shortDescription: Ganxsta Zolee’s 60th-birthday festival with Hungarian hip-hop legends — Saturday 15 August 2026, gates 18:00.
document.longDescription:
Ganxsta Zolee celebrates his 60th birthday with Ganxsta 60 Fesztivál at Budapest Park on Saturday 15 August 2026. The lineup spans his career: Zsolti és a Fosfejűek, Dos Diavolos, KGB, Sex Action, Action, Jack Jack and Ganxsta Zolee és a Kartel. Gates 18:00 at 1095 Budapest, Fábián Juli tér 1.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/en/events/ganxsta-60-fesztival-20260815 https://www.budapestpark.hu/tickets/event/ganxsta_20260815

entryFees.label: Advance — until 15 July 2026
